title: Pure Sabacc (disambiguation)
content:
'''Pure Sabacc''' has several meanings in both Canon and Legends:

==Canon==
*[[Pure Sabacc]], a hand in the card game [[sabacc]], and usually hard to beat
*[[Pure sabacc]], a winning hand in the [[Corellian Spike]] variant of sabacc
*"[[Pure Sabacc (TIE striker pilot)|Pure Sabacc]]," an Imperial [[TIE/sk x1 experimental air superiority fighter|TIE striker]] pilot

==Legends==
*[[Pure Sabacc/Legends|Pure Sabacc]], a type of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] hand, usually hard to beat
*[[Pure Sabacc (starship)|''Pure Sabacc'']], Captain [[Bortrek]]'s ship
*[[Pure Sabacc (Marauder-class)|''Pure Sabacc'']], a private ''Marauder''-class corvette
*[[Pure Sabacc rifle]]
{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Pure Sabacc
}}
